basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) has published the Assistant Project Manager Recruitment 2026 notification on the official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Assistant Project Manager position. Candidates holding a Post Graduate Degree (MBA/MCA/M.Com./M.Sc./M.A./LLM) or Graduate Degree (B.Sc./B.A./B.Com./BBA/BCA/LLB) with 3 years of relevant experience are eligible to apply for this post. The application process will remain open until 03 August 2026 through offline mode. Candidates can easily access the notification PDF and application details below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate (MBA/ MCA/ M.Com./ M.Sc./ M.A./LLM), Graduate (B.Sc./ B.A./ B.Com. BBA/ BCA/ LLB) +3 years of relevant experience
qualification.details: Post Graduate (MBA/ MCA/ M.Com./ M.Sc./ M.A./LLM) Or Graduate (B.Sc./ B.A./ B.Com. BBA/ BCA/ LLB) +3 years of relevant experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://iitk.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://iitk.ac.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Assistant Project Manager position at IIT Kanpur is 03 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Project Manager post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree (MBA/ MCA/ M.Com./ M.Sc./ M.A./LLM) or a Graduate degree (B.Sc./ B.A./ B.Com. BBA/ BCA/ LLB) along with a minimum of 3 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Project Manager role?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Assistant Project Manager post in the Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Project Manager position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Assistant Project Manager post is in the pay scale of 21000-1800-53400, indicating a structured salary progression.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Assistant Project Manager role?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Assistant Project Manager position at IIT Kanpur.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Assistant Project Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Project Manager role involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur, which is https://iitk.ac.in.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I attach with the application form?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of IIT Kanpur?
faq.answer: The official website of the Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur is https://iitk.ac.in. This is where you can find the official notification and download the application form.
